title: Alternative Dark UI
description: A cohesive redesign of the UI based on the look of the Minecraft Wiki.
body: # Alternative Dark UI This is a simple dark mode GUI pack that doesn't just darken the default textures, and doesn't go too far away from the vanilla style either. It is mainly inspired by the pixel-art UI elements of the Minecraft Wiki, and a little bit the Aseprite theme i use. There are other packs that are in this general art-style, but all the ones I've seen aren't as cohesive as i'd like, they add some unneeded flare to certain GUIs, that's why i made this, slightly different, but nice and consistent. (Custom icons above are from my mods, not the pack)
